user_query: I'm planning a workout session and I need some energetic tracks to keep me motivated. Search for workout playlists and recommend some high-energy tracks that I can add to my workout playlist. Additionally, suggest some albums and artists known for their energetic music.

TaskList.description: Search for workout playlists available on streaming platforms.
Recommend high-energy tracks from the retrieved playlists.
Search for albums and artists known for their energetic music.
Compile the recommended high-energy tracks, albums, and artists into a single workout playlist.
